note: Seed recipes. Users can save their own via the UI; custom recipes live in localStorage.

recipes.title: Code review pipeline
recipes.description: Review local changes or a PR, then apply security checks, then verify tests exist.
recipes.intent: review my code thoroughly for quality, security, and tests

recipes.title: PRD → plan → implement
recipes.description: Write a PRD, produce an implementation plan, then execute with validation loops.
recipes.intent: turn an idea into a shipped feature with validation

recipes.title: Onboard an unfamiliar repo
recipes.description: Analyze the codebase, generate onboarding docs, propose an action plan.
recipes.intent: I just cloned a repo I don't know; help me understand it

recipes.title: Security audit pass
recipes.description: OWASP-level review, secret scan, dependency/auth audit.
recipes.intent: audit my app for security vulnerabilities

recipes.title: Dead code + refactor cleanup
recipes.description: Find unused code, consolidate duplication, apply style/refactor pass.
recipes.intent: clean up dead code and refactor duplicates

recipes.title: E2E testing setup
recipes.description: Establish Playwright E2E patterns, record a demo, add regression.
recipes.intent: set up end-to-end tests for my web app

recipes.title: LLM observability
recipes.description: Instrument Claude/OpenAI calls into PostHog LLM Analytics.
recipes.intent: observe my LLM usage and costs

recipes.title: Deep plan → compose workflow
recipes.description: Expand a plan with parallel research, then orchestrate execution.
recipes.intent: plan a big feature deeply and run it with multiple agents

recipes.title: Assemble an agent team
recipes.description: Design a multi-agent team for a project. Roadmap first, then team composition, then phase plan.
recipes.intent: design an autonomous agent team to build a feature

recipes.title: Start a working session
recipes.description: Resume prior context, budget the conversation, set today's intent.
recipes.intent: start a productive session with full context

recipes.title: Product blueprint
recipes.description: Turn a one-line product idea into a full technical blueprint.
recipes.intent: design a complete product from a one-line idea

recipes.title: Systematic debug loop
recipes.description: Reproduce, hypothesize, isolate, fix — with agent introspection.
recipes.intent: debug a hard problem with a structured approach

recipes.title: PostHog instrumentation
recipes.description: Wire up PostHog: SDK + product analytics + LLM analytics + error tracking.
recipes.intent: instrument my app with PostHog

recipes.title: Frontend foundations
recipes.description: Set up a design system, patterns, and E2E coverage.
recipes.intent: build a polished frontend from scratch

recipes.title: Commit → PR → review
recipes.description: Natural-language commit, push, open PR, invite review.
recipes.intent: ship my changes end-to-end

recipes.title: SaaS MVP
recipes.description: Full-stack SaaS with auth, database, billing, and E2E tests. Covers architecture through deployment.
recipes.intent: build a full-stack SaaS product from scratch with auth, payments, and database
steps: Define product scope and data model with architect + planner
Scaffold Next.js app with nextjs-turbopack patterns
Implement auth and billing with security-reviewer guidance
Add database layer with database-reviewer for schema and migrations
Write unit + integration tests with tdd-guide
Add E2E coverage for auth and billing flows with e2e-runner
Deploy to Vercel with deployment-patterns

recipes.title: CLI Tool (Node/npm)
recipes.description: Production-grade Node CLI with argument parsing, tests, and npm publish workflow.
recipes.intent: build a CLI tool in Node.js with full test coverage and publish it to npm
steps: Define CLI interface and commands with planner
Implement core logic with TypeScript; typescript-reviewer validates types
Write tests first with tdd-guide (TDD cycle for each command)
Run build-error-resolver on any compilation issues
Security review: arg injection, file access with security-reviewer
Prepare npm package with opensource-packager (README, LICENSE, .npmignore)

recipes.title: REST / GraphQL API Service
recipes.description: Backend API with OpenAPI docs, database layer, auth middleware, tests, and Dockerised deploy.
recipes.intent: build a REST or GraphQL API with documentation, tests, and deployment
steps: Design API contract (OpenAPI 3.1 or GraphQL schema) with api-design
Implement routes and business logic following backend-patterns
Design and migrate database schema with database-reviewer
Add auth middleware and input validation with security-reviewer
TDD all endpoints with tdd-guide
Containerise with docker-patterns
Deploy with deployment-patterns

recipes.title: Custom Claude Agent
recipes.description: Claude Code agent with custom tools, memory, MCP server, and evaluation harness.
recipes.intent: build a custom AI agent with tools, memory, and a test harness
steps: Design agent goals, tools, and memory schema with planner
Implement core LLM loop with claude-api patterns
Expose tools as MCP server using mcp-server-patterns
Wire autonomous execution with autonomous-agent-harness
Write unit tests for each tool and memory operation with tdd-guide
Security review: prompt injection, tool call validation with security-reviewer
Evaluate agent quality with agent-eval (benchmark scenarios)

recipes.title: Data Pipeline (ETL / Analytics)
recipes.description: Python ETL pipeline with orchestration, data quality checks, monitoring, and scheduled runs.
recipes.intent: build a data pipeline or ETL process with scheduling and monitoring
steps: Map data sources, transformations, and sinks with planner
Implement extraction and transformation scripts with python-reviewer
Design warehouse schema and load strategy with database-reviewer
Profile and optimise slow transforms with performance-optimizer
Write data quality assertion tests with tdd-guide
Containerise and schedule with docker-patterns

recipes.title: Mobile App (Flutter)
recipes.description: Cross-platform mobile app with CI/CD, deep linking, push notifications, and store packaging.
recipes.intent: build a cross-platform mobile app with CI and store deployment
steps: Define screens, navigation, and state model with planner
Implement UI in Flutter with flutter-reviewer validating idioms
Apply frontend-patterns for theming, accessibility, responsive layout
Unit-test business logic and widget tests with tdd-guide
Add E2E device tests for core flows with e2e-runner
Security review: deep link handling, secure storage with security-reviewer
Configure CI/CD and release signing with deployment-patterns
